name: Create ADR (real handler — scaffold MADR + open PR via GitHub App)

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ref: 'refs/heads/' + $('Build ADR + Branch Plan').first().json._branch, sha: $json.object.sha }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'feat(adr): scaffold ADR-' + $('Build ADR + Branch Plan').first().json._nnnn + ' ' + $('Build ADR + Branch Plan').first().json._title, content: $('Build ADR + Branch Plan').first().json._contentB64, branch: $('Build ADR + Branch Plan').first().json._branch }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ title: 'ADR-' + $('Build ADR + Branch Plan').first().json._nnnn + ': ' + $('Build ADR + Branch Plan').first().json._title, head: $('Build ADR + Branch Plan').first().json._branch, base: ($env['GITHUB_BASE_BRANCH'] || 'main'), body: '## Context

' + $('Build ADR + Branch Plan').first().json._context + '

---

Scaffolded by the create-adr n8n workflow. Reviewer: please fill in the remaining MADR sections (Decision Drivers, Considered Options, Decision Outcome, Validation, Links) before merge.', draft: false }) }}

_comment: Real handler. Pattern mirrors health-check.json (PR #10): webhook → HMAC validate (R-02 fail-closed) → Respond 200 in parallel → ADR-0003 sign → Call Skills Router → Routing Gate IF (skill==='create-adr' && status!=='pending_approval') → GitHub-App branch (Build JWT → Get Installation Token → List ADRs → Read Template → Build ADR + Branch Plan → Get Base SHA → Create Branch → Commit File → Open PR ready-for-review) → Telegram reply. Required env vars: CREATE_ADR_WEBHOOK_SECRET, SKILLS_ROUTER_URL, SKILLS_ROUTER_SECRET, GITHUB_APP_ID, GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY (PEM, multi-line), GITHUB_APP_INSTALLATION_ID, GITHUB_OWNER, GITHUB_REPO, GITHUB_BASE_BRANCH (default 'main'), TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN. Numbering reads docs/adr/ via the Contents API (max(NNNN-)+1, zero-padded); slug is [a-z0-9-] capped at 60 chars; template substitution is plain String.replace on the four MADR placeholders. Inbound payload contract: { title: string, context: string, chat_id: number|string, user_id?: number|string }.
